title: Robbot | disable commands
description:
This plugin allows you to disable commands.

If you only want to disable the command 'fx' in the overworld, you can do that with this plugin!
body:
Compatible with version 1.21.8.

Also works with the Multiverse-Core plugin.

Players with /op will bypass the command restrictions.






How to use!


/rb disablecommand "testcommand" "all" 

/rb disablecommand "testcommand" "world_the_end"

/rb enablecommand "testcommand" "world_the_end"

/rb enablecommand "testcommand" "all"

(Do not include the slash; it will be added automatically)
